testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from entrepreneurs who chose VendShop.
testimonials.testimonial1: I set up my bakery shop in 15 minutes. Orders started coming the same day! The AI descriptions saved me hours of work.
testimonials.testimonial2: Finally a simple platform for my repair service. Customers find me online and book directly. Highly recommended!
testimonials.testimonial3: Beautiful design, easy to manage. My beauty salon website looks professional and I didn't need a developer.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about VendShop.
faq.q1: How long does it take to create a website?
faq.a1: Usually 24–48 hours after receiving your materials (logo, texts, photos). More complex projects (Individual) may take 3–5 days.
faq.q2: What if I don't like the website?
faq.a2: We offer 2 free revision rounds (Landing) or 5 rounds (Premium). If you're still not satisfied, we delete the site and you pay nothing. Zero risk.
faq.q3: What does the monthly fee include?
faq.a3: Hosting on fast servers, SSL certificate, AI chatbot for your customers, and 1 content change per month. Everything worry-free.
faq.a4: Yes, anytime with no commitment. The website remains yours — you can transfer it or simply stop. No penalties.
faq.a5: SK, EN, DE, CS, UK — based on client requirements. Multilingual websites are included in Premium and Individual plans.
faq.q6: How long does it take to create a store?
faq.a6: 5 minutes to a live store. Here's the breakdown: 1) pick a business type and color scheme (30 sec), 2) add your store name and description (1 min), 3) upload your first products (3 min). AI can generate product descriptions and SEO metadata for you automatically.
faq.q7: I don't speak the local language. Can I still create a store?
faq.a7: Absolutely. Write in any of the 5 supported languages (SK, EN, UK, CS, DE) and our AI translates everything — product titles, descriptions, checkout pages — in 1 click. Free plan includes 1 translation, paid plans offer unlimited. Over 30% of our stores are run by international sellers.
